prompt_task: I have a single-cell ATAC-seq cluster counts pseudobulks lying around from human retinal-associated tissue (sample.swap.atac.q2.tsv.gz). I'm not sure, but I suspect there is a sample swap. Can you check if that is the case? If there isn't, respond "None". Else respond with the names of the two cell types that have been swapped in case-sensitive lexicographic order, e.g. "AIIamacrine,Rod". Run the analysis inside the Galaxy environment.
